text:

Dear Brian, 

Please contact questions@FreeBSD.org in case you need helping with 
getting the right media and/or distribution you want to use. You 
now reached the PRoblem Report database, which contains confirmed 
or potential bugs, which is different then your report. 

Thank you for using FreeBSD and trying to make it better! It's greatly 
appreciated!
